# Guarded Data Pipelines

Manage OCI Guarded Data Pipeline resources from Kubernetes with a reviewed controller-backed GdpPipeline rollout.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `gdp` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-gdp-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-gdp:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-gdp-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to GdpPipeline while GDP work-request helper and auxiliary operation families stay unpublished.
- The published runtime uses service-SDK work requests for create, update, and delete, scopes pre-create reuse by exact `compartmentId`, `displayName`, `pipelineType`, `peeringRegion`, and `bucketDetails`, and keeps `bucketDetails`, `compartmentId`, `peeringRegion`, and `pipelineType` replacement-only.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
